item.title: Marvin Gaye
item.description: Genres: Soul, Pop soul, psychedelic soul, quiet storm Scene: Detroit / Motown Records Era: 1961–1984 (primary period: 1964–1973) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Listen to the shift between “I Heard It Through the Grapevine” (1968) and What’s Going On (1971): from a single built on paranoia and rhythmic ...

item.title: Muddy Waters
item.description: Genres: Chicago blues, Electric blues, Delta blues Scene: Chicago (Chess Records) Era: 1948–1958 (Chess peak); active to 1983 RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The voice is unhurried and half-spoken, sure of itself to the point of menace, a man stating his business and daring the room to disagree.

item.title: The Funk Brothers
item.description: Location: Hitsville U.S.A., Detroit, Michigan Period: 1959–1972 Key members: James Jamerson (bass), Benny Benjamin (drums), Earl Van Dyke (keyboards), Robert White (guitar), Eddie Willis (guitar), Joe Messina (guitar), Jack Ashford (percussion), Uriel Jones (drums) RYM The most prolific and least cr...
